channel.title: The K-Beauty Data Desk
channel.description: I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare.

item.title: Aestura Atobarrier 365 Cream: What 35,053 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Aestura Atobarrier 365 Cream: 4.9★ from 35,053 Korean reviews (90% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: La Roche-Posay Cicaplast Baume B5: What 24,566 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: La Roche-Posay Cicaplast Baume B5: 4.8★ from 24,566 Korean reviews (86% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: Wellage Real Hyaluronic Blue 100 Ampoule: What 8,455 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Wellage Real Hyaluronic Blue 100 Ampoule: 4.8★ from 8,455 Korean reviews (89% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: Mediheal Madecassoside Blemish Repair Serum: What 41,856 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Mediheal Madecassoside Blemish Repair Serum: 4.7★ from 41,856 Korean reviews (82% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Capsule Serum: What 19,105 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Capsule Serum: 4.8★ from 19,105 Korean reviews (84% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Hydra Capsule Mist: What 5,711 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Hydra Capsule Mist: 4.6★ from 5,711 Korean reviews (76% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.
